Beverly Hills permit portal and PermitPulse coverage

Beverly Hills is listed in the current PermitPulse jurisdiction catalog with live-data support in California. Start with the official Community Development Portal portal, review the current coverage notes below, and use Mission Control when the permit record needs more context.
